projects.title: Running Platform
projects.description: Full-stack microservices platform for runners. Features JWT auth with refresh token rotation, workout tracking, performance analytics with Recharts dashboard, 9 Docker containers orchestrated via Compose with Nginx reverse proxy, PostgreSQL databases and Redis caching. Includes 39 automated tests across 3 microservices.

projects.title: DevOps Tool Reference
projects.description: Curated collection of guides, commands and quick references for DevOps, system administration and software development. Covers Linux commands, Docker operations, and cloud-native workflows with practical, ready-to-use examples.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: Interactive cloud engineering portfolio built with vanilla JavaScript and a Kubernetes-inspired dark theme. Features dynamic certification filtering, badge modals, skill visualizations, project showcase, and particle animations. Fully responsive and accessible.

projects.title: GitHub Profile README
projects.description: Personal GitHub profile overview showcasing cloud engineering journey, current certifications, technical skills, and ongoing learning path in Azure, DevOps, and Infrastructure as Code.
